parameters.query:
SELECT m.id AS mailbox_id, m.email AS mailbox_email
FROM mailboxes m
WHERE m.is_active = true
ORDER BY m.email;

INSERT INTO email_threads (
  mailbox_id, provider_thread_id, client_id, subject,
  first_message_at, last_message_at, message_count, last_direction, status
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.mailbox_id }}',
  '{{ $json.provider_thread_id }}',
  {{ $json.client_id !== null ? "'" + $json.client_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.subject }}',
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  1,
  '{{ $json.direction }}',
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.direction }}' = 'client_to_team' THEN 'waiting_team'::public.thread_status
    WHEN '{{ $json.direction }}' = 'team_to_client' THEN 'waiting_client'::public.thread_status
    ELSE 'open'::public.thread_status
  END
)
ON CONFLICT (mailbox_id, provider_thread_id) DO UPDATE
  SET last_message_at = GREATEST(email_threads.last_message_at, EXCLUDED.last_message_at),
      message_count   = email_threads.message_count + 1,
      last_direction  = EXCLUDED.last_direction,
      client_id       = COALESCE(email_threads.client_id, EXCLUDED.client_id),
      status          = CASE
        WHEN EXCLUDED.last_direction = 'client_to_team' THEN 'waiting_team'::public.thread_status
        WHEN EXCLUDED.last_direction = 'team_to_client' THEN 'waiting_client'::public.thread_status
        WHEN email_threads.status    = 'closed'         THEN 'open'::public.thread_status
        ELSE email_threads.status
      END
RETURNING id AS thread_id;

INSERT INTO email_messages (
  mailbox_id, thread_id, client_id, provider_message_id, internet_message_id,
  subject, snippet, body_text, sent_at, direction, raw_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.mailbox_id }}',
  '{{ $json.thread_id }}',
  {{ $json.client_id !== null ? "'" + $json.client_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.provider_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.internet_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.subject }}',
  '{{ $json.snippet }}',
  '{{ $json.body_text }}',
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  '{{ $json.direction }}',
  '{{ $json.raw_payload }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (mailbox_id, provider_message_id) DO UPDATE
  SET thread_id           = EXCLUDED.thread_id,
      client_id           = COALESCE(email_messages.client_id, EXCLUDED.client_id),
      snippet             = EXCLUDED.snippet,
      body_text           = EXCLUDED.body_text,
      direction           = EXCLUDED.direction,
      raw_payload         = EXCLUDED.raw_payload
RETURNING id AS message_id;

INSERT INTO email_message_participants (message_id, email, full_name, participant_role)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.role }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id, participant_role, email) DO NOTHING;

UPDATE email_threads SET
  message_count    = (SELECT count(*) FROM email_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{ $json.thread_id }}'),
  first_message_at = (SELECT min(sent_at) FROM email_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{ $json.thread_id }}'),
  last_message_at  = (SELECT max(sent_at) FROM email_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{ $json.thread_id }}')
WHERE id = '{{ $json.thread_id }}';

INSERT INTO sync_cursors (integration_key, cursor_value)
VALUES (
  'gmail_date::' || '{{ $('Build Gmail query').first().json.mailbox_email }}',
  to_char(now(), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
)
ON CONFLICT (integration_key) DO UPDATE
  SET cursor_value = EXCLUDED.cursor_value,
      updated_at   = now();
